title: MT-CPSO-F: A Masked Transformer and Combinatorial PSO Framework for Full-Field Wind Pressure Reconstruction
description: Reference implementation of MT-CPSO-F and three modal-basis baselines (SVD-QR, mrDMD-QR, POD-Transformer) for full-field wind pressure reconstruction from sparse sensors, accompanying the paper submitted to Automation in Construction. Code only; the TPU pressure-tap data is downloaded separately by the user from the TPU Aerodynamic Database.
